payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty. Last few things. One  this is Sub-tember, guys, by the way, for Twitch. Sub-tember means for the next few weeks, Twitch has a special promotion where subscriptions are half off for new subs for every Twitch channel, including this one. So if you've been watching and you've always wanted to subscribe, but you never really felt like you can give the full $5, it's half off this month. So if you want to subscribe to our Twitch, now's the month to do it. Just giving the heads-up. It's pretty rad, and thank you, Sub-tember. Last but not least, Laura and Travis, you are going to be at an event soon, aren't you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's coming out with the DLC for Middle Earth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, to tie in with it. Of course, we have Talks Machina coming up this Tuesday at 7:00pm Pacific, here with our fantastic host, Brian. We'll be talking about our episode tonight. So look for that next week. All the Critical Role episodes are now available on Alpha. They've gone back and added the bells and whistles, the information, the stats, everything, for all the episodes before Alpha even launched. So if you ever watched it there, it's all updated.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I really should check my email!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We would miss this sense of wonder that we get to share with the community. It's really nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They get your unbridled reaction.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's like watching Home Alone next to Macaulay Culkin. It's great. I'm getting so much out of it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Not if you haven't recast it because after the short rest it would've been gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And the tunnel's rising steadily upwards?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. It's coming at an incline.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How's it look?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's dark up there. I can only see about 60 feet up. Does it keep going beyond that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The incline isn't increasing. It gets to about a 45-degree incline and then maintains that up until the outside of your visual range.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm a punching bag for this shit. Why don't you all wait here a minute. Wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want me to fly up there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, will you go with me?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course. Can you not use your wings?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They're gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, then hop on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This could be the last time we do this. Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, there's only four games left, Sam.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You don't know that!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's scripted! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's going to be a Reddit thread later.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we have Pass Without a Trace on?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I think that probably faded by now.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Gone for two weeks and you guys can't find middle math. It's only extremes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is Vax in the room?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I took two steps back from the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, nobody's in the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's say that investigation was somewhere around a seven? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's pretty solid at this point. The walls that lean in towards the ceiling there-- it is a perfect solid iron slab that has closed off at the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No problem. I'll get it down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait. Simon is technically a magical item, so I don't think he would be harmed by anything going on in there, so why don't we give it five minutes?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And maybe it'll open again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is there anything going on in the tunnel, on the outside of this door, where we are?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Coming up from behind us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Temperature check, anything like that? Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have been gone so long!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So as you guys glance back in the shadow of the tunnel behind you, nothing seems to be catching your eye. It's still dark. About two minutes in, what was once dark metal is now giving a slight orangish hue. You can feel the heat emanating from it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's say that investigation was somewhere around a seven? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's pretty solid at this point. The walls that lean in towards the ceiling there-- it is a perfect solid iron slab that has closed off at the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have been gone so long!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Gone for two weeks and you guys can't find middle math. It's only extremes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we've had blue balls for two weeks, and it's all coming out now.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: About five minutes go by as you guys are waiting. Eventually, the iron wall begins to descend. The dull orangish glow of it is still there. As it opens, a wave of heated air emerges from the chamber. You all have to immediately close your eyes. Some of you instinctually begin to step further back into the hallway. On the inside of the room, you can see the black iron interior of the chamber is also that same orangish glow. The mirror is unscathed. You all step back and watch and a few minutes pass as it slowly begins to cool off, the metal slowly darkening. You're too far away to look. You make a perception check to try and glance in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Coming up from behind us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Temperature check, anything like that? Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have been gone so long!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Gone for two weeks and you guys can't find middle math. It's only extremes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we've had blue balls for two weeks, and it's all coming out now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as you guys glance back in the shadow of the tunnel behind you, nothing seems to be catching your eye. It's still dark. About two minutes in, what was once dark metal is now giving a slight orangish hue. You can feel the heat emanating from it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There's no ash on the floor in the hallway that we are in right now, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say, because of your perception check, as you glance around, there does not appear to be any ash.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't want that door to fucking open all of a sudden.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't want that door to fucking open all of a sudden.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, no. If you guys want to take a few minutes, you can wait until it cools off, if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The pieces are still there, but it's black carbon. There's nothing in there that could burn. Whatever's been in there has been heated so much to the point--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's not the source of the flame. Not for that much heat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If I was the person who designed this, why would I put a failsafe in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A way to get through that only the creator would know how to use?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like there's got to be another entrance because we can see another room, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There's no other room, it's a mirror. Oh, Keyleth, that's our reflection.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I know that, but a lot of things have reflections.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Listen, all of you, or I, are going to be dead very soon. Are you sure you want to be that sarcastic right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I go up to the mirror and check it out. It's cooled off enough, right?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, I take it you wait until it cools off. It takes about ten minutes or so for it to fully cool off, to the point where it's comfortable.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If I was the person who designed this, why would I put a failsafe in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A way to get through that only the creator would know how to use?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like there's got to be another entrance because we can see another room, right?

preceding_turns.text: There's no other room, it's a mirror. Oh, Keyleth, that's our reflection.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I know that, but a lot of things have reflections.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Listen, all of you, or I, are going to be dead very soon. Are you sure you want to be that sarcastic right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I go up to the mirror and check it out. It's cooled off enough, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, no. If you guys want to take a few minutes, you can wait until it cools off, if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we try pushing all four buttons at once?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, before we do that, I'm going to enter the room and look around at the walls and the ceiling.

payload.raw_text: Three. You smear a bit of ash, but eventually get some semblance of shine through. Nothing catches your eye.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm going to go up and go tap-tap-tap on the mirror.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Can I wipe off the edges around the frame and see if there's anything around the frame of the mirror, since I seem to be so good at this?

payload.raw_text: Yeah, because that's one of the cool things about rogues. You guys make your way up about 45, 50 or so feet up the stairway, you keeping an eye out, no traps, nothing catches your eye as iffy or strange, and the stairs now switch back into another set. It's a small landing and then it continues upward.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Well, not any roll. Any ability check he has to make.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay, well, we wrongly assumed that ones and 20s were king, but no.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: So he rolled way better than me because I rolled a ten.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's an 18. My one is an 18 now.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I was like, you guys literally had this conversation an hour ago, but okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The boys all die. The girls go to glory.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to kiss Percy before he goes. Don't die in this stupid temple.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will not die in this stupid temple.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I slap him in the face.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right on, Scanlan. Sorry, Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Who's traveling in what group?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Girls are going to look for stairs, the boys are going in the stupid temple.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I yank the druid in for a kiss.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, shit. Your fucking ring.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! My fucking ring! We can't split the party.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, can't split the party. We all go looking for the stairs. Oh, you asshole, stop it! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He was really excited about it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I was waiting on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, he was so excited about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, into the temple. Come on, let's just fucking go to the fucking temple.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The temple where you guys were at, at the time was 50 feet away from you, but you would have crossed the other side of the hall. So now it's about 100 feet away from you. At this distance, you can see it's a round, almost cylindrical building, Colosseum-esque. And there's a small square window about every 25 to 30 feet. And it's big. It's large, but you can see that faint glow between multiple windows from this distance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So it's like 28 Days Later zombies?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 28 Days Later, they run.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He said that they were fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, the last one-- it was flavor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just wanted to make sure they weren't special.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you finish the fray and hold yourself, you wait and wait. You do not hear or notice any more advancing undead from that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, how about I don't move and somebody with flying ability go to check out that blue glowy window?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have to stick together.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is the glowy window within 60 feet?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, it's far.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: When we were at the opening, we were 50 to 60 feet away.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It hurts a little bit, and you wince after a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Does it have the vibe of something petrified?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it has almost a quartz-like look to it. Elements of it appear to be cloudier or imperfect, and some areas appear to be clearer, and light shines through a little brighter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like a hunk at the natural history museum of minerals.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but there is an enchantment.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What about Pikey-pants? Can she detect if it's evil or good or something? Does she do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You should do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You don't get a sense of any evil from the stone.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You said no sense of evil?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No evil coming from the stone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to gaze into it super hard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You look really hard into the stone as you hold it to your face, and your eyes almost cross as you glance into the very core source of this pulsating arcane energy. It's bright.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So bright, y'all.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, no, you still have to roll to see if you aim. You have advantage on the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, the first one you saw just stepped out of the center of the hall there, and then the two others walked down the hallway. You're aiming at the one that came out of the side of the wall?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Has he seen the two coming down the stairway yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's been discussion over the shoulder. They seem to be aware of each other's presence, but they haven't come together to engage as three in the same area yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will follow my sister's lead. If she attacks one, I send one to another one and two to the third.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll attack the first so he can take the second.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One. Two, three.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: These are auto-crits, though, because we are surprising them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I Hunter's Mark him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you can Hunter's Mark him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so we don't have to roll for attack? It's an auto-crit.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We're about to roll initiative, motherfuckers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: May I also dump some poison?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure, into which one?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Into the first one. I did one into my first target and two into the second; the poison would have gone into the second person. It's a DC of 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. DC of 15? Yeah, that succeeds. 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So nothing, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nothing, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Balls!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As soon as the one crumples to the ground and the two other daggers into the other two that are there, they (grunt). They see the one fall. The one in the center of the chamber glances over his shoulder and says, "It seems I'm the lucky one. Odell, run back and tell that Viskorad found sneaky prey." The one immediately to the left begins to run up the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I shoot him again before he runs away?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope because you took your turn. This is their reaction.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. You need help, Matt?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Initiative!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Apparently not, as recent events have shown. So now, I need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: May I also dump some poison?

preceding_turns.text: Sure, into which one?

preceding_turns.text: Initiative!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We're about to roll initiative, motherfuckers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, guys. We did it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Viskon? We've heard the name Viskon before.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We've also heard the name Odell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Odell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Odell comma tell Viskon we have visitors. Wait, when did we hear Odell before?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I just know we've heard it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's been three Jamieson's in our campaign, too. Matt isn't an infinite fount of names.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone else is still down the stairs right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wonder if we should have let them talk for a second. Oh, well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's not our way.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Nice. All right, 36 points of damage in one round. The arrows (impact) as he is pulled through the rock and rubble by the Grasping Vine that is currently wrapped around him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He has to roll a dexterity save above 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Get it! Get it, son!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's an eight. He is running up the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So it snatches his ankle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And then drags him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Backwards. Then I'm going to shoot him twice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not that one. That one looks like he knows too much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What is that? 32.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 32, that hits. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 14, plus four lightning damage. I don't get sneak attack on this guy, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. 14, plus four lightning damage, and then I'm going to hit him again. That is also a 32. No, that's-- well, it's very high. 27? 28

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 28. All right, that hits. Roll damage. Grog, you're up next. You're in the back of the marching order.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're not up at the top, are we?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. So you've got at least 25, 30 feet before you can get to the top there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 12, plus six lightning damage.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Until you finish a long rest. The other one's striking at you, Keyleth. That is a 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ghosts! Shadows!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No. What? Ghosts or wraiths?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wraiths.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's ten different kinds of things like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, was wraiths what fucked me and you up when we were evil Vax and Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, and look what they're doing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This one hovers over and lands behind Keyleth. And it's going to attempt, as it seems to shift through the pillar--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I look over my shoulder and go  Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This one here stays within the pillar, and it reaches out, as it's incorporeal, and strikes at you. That is 24 against you, Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You suffer 21 points of necrotic damage, and I need you to succeed on a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: My fucking god!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a 20? (screaming)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Well, you suffer the 21 points of necrotic damage, and your maximum hit points are reduced by 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Forever?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. You glance up and get just beyond where Keyleth is, pushing past. You have five more feet you can move if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's wrong with us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wasted all of our 20s on goods.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Tonight is ridiculous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as you release the Ice Knife, it slams into the wall. No effect. However, it does still explode, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So it does what damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 2d6 damage. So go ahead and roll 2d6. To both you and the creature?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, all creatures within range.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Technically, reroll ones. Three, four, five, six, seven. Yeah, each creature. Hit or miss, the shard then explodes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you take seven points of ice damage, and it hits the wraith. However, the cold damage doesn't seem to have as much of an effect as you would expect.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's a fucking wraith!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends their turn. Percival, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I hear a whole bunch of commotion, so I'm going to pop my head up out of the hole and see what the fuck is going on.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's the one she's rifling through.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But stay within 60 feet. Everybody gather up around me again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sis, come up to where Scanlan is so I can go a little further ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone is barely still within 60 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Everyone gather up. We're going to get our stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Avoid the ball.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Vax, can I borrow a dagger?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I give her Whisper.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I take it and I stab it in his other eye. Red robe guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (splat) Other eye is destroyed.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use Bigby's Hand to grab the sphere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you? Okay. Bigby's Hand reaches over and grabs towards the sphere, and as Bigby's form attempts to grasp the chaotic point of destructive energy, Bigby's Hand suffers 26 points of force damage and is forced to pull back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's not so bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But cannot grasp it. Cannot move it. (electrical shock)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to rifle through the robes of red robe.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to get Odell.
